objections.title: Ticket file list is stale — majority of listed files are already committed
objections.detail: The ticket's Evidence section lists 6 files as untracked that have already been committed by auto-bulk commits f431fa7 (2026-05-24T12:40:02Z) and 83c5720 (2026-05-24T12:45:04Z). Specifically, these files are TRACKED AND CLEAN (not dirty) at the time of BA-QA validation: docs/dev/completion-20260524-101700.md, docs/dev/context-20260524-101700.json, docs/dev/qa-report-20260524-101700.json, docs/dev/ticket-20260524-101700.md, docs/dev/ticket-20260524-122910.md, docs/dev/context-20260524-122910.json. Additionally, docs/dev/dev-report-20260524-101700.json is no longer in ' M' (tracked-modified) state. The actual current git status --porcelain output shows completely different dirty files: ' M commands/INDEX.md', ' M commands/commit.md', ' M docs/dev/INDEX.md', ' M docs/dev/ticket-20260524-122910.md', ' M hooks/INDEX.md', ' M hooks/pretool-git-privilege-guard.py', '?? docs/dev/acceptance-criteria-20260524-123039.json', '?? docs/dev/context-20260524-123039.json', '?? docs/dev/style-inspector-report-20260524-101700.json'. The ticket's M1 staging list is therefore directing dev to stage files that are already committed (a no-op at best, an error at worst).
objections.evidence: git log --oneline shows f431fa7 committed completion-20260524-101700.md, context-20260524-101700.json, dev-report-20260524-101700.json, qa-report-20260524-101700.json, ticket-20260524-101700.md. Commit 83c5720 committed context-20260524-122910.json, ticket-20260524-122910.md. git status --porcelain at BA-QA time shows none of these as dirty.
objections.required_fix: BA must re-run git status --porcelain, replace the Evidence file list with the actual current dirty files, and update M1, the Technical Hints staging list, and all AC1 references to reflect the real files that remain uncommitted.

objections.title: AC3 asserts /close todo state is resolved but workflow file proves it is ACTIVE
objections.detail: AC3 instructs dev to record in the note: 'No /tmp/claude-workflow-* file found for session c216ded5-b7e1-4432-b79f-a6a2042971fe as of 2026-05-24 — /close todo state is resolved.' This is factually incorrect on two counts. First, the workflow file EXISTS in the repo at .claude/workflow-c216ded5-b7e1-4432-b79f-a6a2042971fe.json (not /tmp — BA looked in the wrong location). Second, the file content shows last_todos with Step 6 ('QA validates BA conclusions') at status: 'in_progress', meaning the /close workflow for this session is CURRENTLY RUNNING (this very BA-QA invocation is Step 6). The /close todo state is NOT resolved; it is in_progress. Dev would be writing a false statement as a permanent artifact if this AC is executed as-is.
objections.evidence: File .claude/workflow-c216ded5-b7e1-4432-b79f-a6a2042971fe.json exists. Content: last_todos contains step 6 'QA validates BA conclusions' with status: 'in_progress'. The /tmp path referenced in AC3 is the wrong location — workflow files live in .claude/, not /tmp/.
objections.required_fix: BA must (a) correct the file location from /tmp/claude-workflow-* to .claude/workflow-*, (b) reassess whether /close todo state is actually resolved at the time the note will be written (it cannot be confirmed resolved until /close completes), and (c) either remove AC3 or reframe it as a future-tense assertion to be verified by QA post-close rather than a static historical claim to be written verbatim into the note.

objections.title: Ticket's scope omits newly-dirty files that appeared after BA investigation
objections.detail: The current git status shows additional dirty files not mentioned in the ticket: commands/INDEX.md (tracked-modified), commands/commit.md (tracked-modified), hooks/INDEX.md (tracked-modified), hooks/pretool-git-privilege-guard.py (tracked-modified), and docs/dev/style-inspector-report-20260524-101700.json (untracked). The ticket explicitly scopes 'Any file outside docs/dev/' as excluded and limits staging to only the listed files. This means 4 dirty files outside docs/dev/ (commands/INDEX.md, commands/commit.md, hooks/INDEX.md, hooks/pretool-git-privilege-guard.py) plus one new untracked file inside docs/dev/ (style-inspector-report-20260524-101700.json) are left in limbo by the ticket scope. Whether these should be included in the commit or explicitly documented as out-of-scope must be determined before dispatch.
objections.evidence: git status --porcelain output at BA-QA time: ' M commands/INDEX.md', ' M commands/commit.md', ' M hooks/INDEX.md', ' M hooks/pretool-git-privilege-guard.py', '?? docs/dev/style-inspector-report-20260524-101700.json'. None of these appear in the ticket's Evidence section or Technical Hints staging list.
objections.required_fix: BA should explicitly acknowledge these additional dirty files in the Evidence section, and either include them in the staging list or add them to Won't Have with documented rationale. Silent omission creates an incomplete audit trail.

observations.title: Constraint correctness on dev commit prohibition is accurate
observations.detail: agents/dev.md line 787 confirms: 'FORBIDDEN git verbs for dev subagent: commit, revert, push, merge, cherry-pick, rebase, reset --hard, stash push, branch -D.' Line 788: 'If the spec says to commit the fix, dev produces the file edits and reports them as ready_to_commit; the orchestrator (or user) does the commit.' The ticket's constraint section correctly describes this — dev stages only, orchestrator dispatches /commit. No objection.

observations.title: close-report-20260524-101700.md exists and Gap content is present at lines 55-101
observations.detail: docs/dev/close-report-20260524-101700.md exists. Lines 54-101 contain the three Gap descriptions: GAP 1 (tombstone timing), GAP 2 (snapshot persistence delay), GAP 3 (MemoryMax defaults). The AC2 reference source is valid and readable by dev. No objection on this dimension.

observations.title: BA-cycle own artifacts (ticket-20260524-123039.md, context-20260524-123039.json, acceptance-criteria-20260524-123039.json) are correctly identified as untracked new files to stage
observations.detail: git status confirms '?? docs/dev/acceptance-criteria-20260524-123039.json' and '?? docs/dev/context-20260524-123039.json' as untracked. ticket-20260524-123039.md is tracked (committed in 83c5720). The Technical Hints section correctly includes these in the staging list. Minor note: ticket-20260524-123039.md is already committed and does not need re-staging.

observations.title: AC measurability for AC1 and AC2 is adequate assuming file list is corrected
observations.detail: AC1 uses git show HEAD --name-only — a concrete, QA-runnable command. AC2 uses cat/read on the note file with specific string checks — concrete and verifiable. These are structurally sound ACs; their content accuracy is the issue (covered by OBJ-1 and OBJ-2), not their measurability.

_note: codex_required: true was set in the dispatch prompt, but this is a BA-validation invocation (not a dev-implementation QA), and codex consultation is scoped to dev-QA post-implementation review per the agent file's Codex adversarial consultation section (OPT-IN for post-dev verification). BA-validation mode does not invoke codex. Proceeding with self-review.
